title: Chronozon
wikitext:
{{External|rs|rsc}} {{Otheruses|the quest boss fought during [[Family Crest]]|the [[Nightmare Zone]] variant|Chronozon (Nightmare Zone)}} {{Infobox Monster |name = Chronozon |image = [[File:Chronozon.png|250px]] |release = [[9 April]] [[2002]] |update = New members quest online! |members = Yes |combat = 170 |size = 3 |examine = Chronozon the blood demon. |attributes = demon |xpbonus = -97.5 |max hit = 18 |aggressive = Yes |poisonous = No |attack style = [[Slash]] |attack speed = 4 |hitpoints = 60 |att = 173 |str = 172 |def = 173 |mage = 1 |range = 1 |attbns = 0 |strbns = 0 |amagic = 0 |mbns = 0 |arange = 0 |rngbns = 0 |dstab = 0 |dslash = 0 |dcrush = 0 |dmagic = 0 |drange = 0 |immunepoison = No |immunevenom = No |respawn = 30 |id = 4987 |elementalweaknesstype=Water |elementalweaknesspercent=25}} '''Chronozon''' is a blood [[demon]] that must be defeated towards the end of the [[Family Crest]] [[quest]]. It is found in the [[Wilderness]] area of the [[Edgeville Dungeon]], by the [[Earth obelisk]]. Chronozon must be hit with all four elemental [[blast spells]] in order to be killed, or otherwise it will return to full health when it is nearly dead.(Note TWINFLAME STAFF double hit does not count) Players should note that Chronozon has to be ''hit'' (i.e. do actual damage: if the spell splashes, it will not count). It will not drop the crest part unless the player has completed most of the quest. He can be fought in the [[Nightmare Zone]] after the quest is complete. ==Location== {{LocTableHead|league=yes}} {{LocLine |name = Chronozon |location = [[Edgeville Dungeon]] (Wilderness) |levels = 170 |members = Yes |mapID = 12 |plane = 0 |x:3087,y:9937 |mtype = pin |leagueRegion = wilderness }} {{LocTableBottom}} ==Strategy== It is recommended to bring any method of curing [[poison]] before encountering Chronozon, because players will have to pass an area filled with [[poison spider]]s that may attack you before you reach Chronozon. Chronozon is unique in that it has to be hit with each of the 4 elemental blast spells, [[Wind Blast]], [[Water Blast]], [[Earth Blast]] and [[Fire Blast]]. A message will appear in the chatbox, saying "Chronozon weakens" to confirm that the spell has been made effective. Once all 4 elemental spells have been cast on Chronozon, players may do as they wish to defeat him. Since he only uses [[Melee]], continuing to mage him or ranging him is an easy way to finish him off, as there is a safespot in the area. Melee can also be used, but keep in mind that while he has no particular defences against any melee styles, his defence level is fairly high. Once defeated, it will instantly drop the [[Crest part]] onto the floor. ==Drops== ===100%=== {{DropsTableHead}} {{DropsLine|name=Vile ashes|quantity=1|rarity=Always}} {{DropsLine|name=Crest part (Johnathon)|quantity=1|rarity=Always|raritynotes=Crest parts are only dropped during [[Family Crest]].|gemw=No}} {{DropsTableBottom}} {{Reflist|group=d}} ===Tertiary=== {{DropsTableHead}} {{DropsLine|name=Looting bag|quantity=1|rarity=1/3|gemw=No}} {{DropsTableBottom}} ==Changes== {{Subject changes header}} {{Subject changes |date = 16 June 2021 |update = A Kingdom Divided |poll = A Kingdom Divided |change = Chronozon now drops [[vile ashes]] in place of regular ashes. }} {{Subject changes |date = 29 August 2006 |update = Demons, Dragons and Giants |change = The NPC was graphically updated. }} {{Subject changes footer}} ===Gallery (historical)=== {|style="text-align: center" cellpadding="15" |[[File:Chronozon (historical).png|center|300x150px]] |[[File:Chronozon.png|center|300x150px]] |- |29 March 2004 –
29 August 2006 |29 August 2006 –
present |} ==Trivia== *Chronozon's name is likely based on ''{{wp|Choronzon}}'', an abyss-dwelling demon of dispersion that ''{{wp|Edward Kelley}}'', ''{{wp|John Dee}}'', and ''{{wp|Aleister Crowley}}'' wrote about. *When the quest was first released, Chronozon was located in the [[Lava Maze Dungeon]]. Due to player complaints about being killed, he was moved to [[Edgeville Dungeon]] the next day. *After player has defeated Chronozon the first time, they do not need to cast death spells on him to kill him again. {{Family Crest}} {{Demons}} {{Edgeville Dungeon}} [[Category:Bosses]] [[Category:Quest monsters]]
